'''竏嗹-sh-v-g''' ('''kawashvegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yicker|yicker]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yicker|yicker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗹-sh-v-g
|-
! Lemma
| kawashvegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwashvegoko|thiwashvegoko]] || [[word:jiwashvegoko|jiwashvegoko]] || [[word:shiwashvegoko|shiwashvegoko]] || [[word:kiwashvegoko|kiwashvegoko]]
|-

|-
